features.name: Static app foundation
features.description: Vite React TypeScript app with Leaflet map, mobile-first layout, and local static deployment structure.
features.evidence: Verified with npm test, npm run build, and browser smoke coverage on 2026-06-11; current browser baseline is npm run test:e2e.

features.name: CSV conversion and local data
features.description: Decode Big5/CP950 CSV, drop invalid rows, ignore Unnamed: 5, preserve warning note, and output public/data/bins.json.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 1197 usable records in public/data/bins.json.

features.name: Bilingual public map experience
features.description: Traditional Chinese default UI with English toggle, search, district filter, nearby geolocation list, Google Maps links, and public-use warning.
features.evidence: Browser smoke test confirmed Chinese title, English toggle, 1197 records, search/filter narrowing, markers, and no page errors.

features.name: PWA-ready shell
features.description: Manifest, icon placeholder, service worker caching app shell and local JSON data, and README usage notes.
features.evidence: public/manifest.webmanifest, public/service-worker.js, public/icons/icon.svg, and README.md added; production build passes.

features.name: Agent harness
features.description: Minimal harness files for agent startup, scope control, verification, progress tracking, and session handoff.
features.evidence: Harness validator scored 100/100; ./init.sh passed npm test, npm run build, and browser smoke test on 2026-06-11.

features.name: Designer polish pass
features.description: Elevate the public map UI with a cohesive civic field-guide visual direction while preserving the existing static app behavior.
features.evidence: Implemented civic field-guide UI polish; ./init.sh passed npm test, npm run build, and browser smoke test on 2026-06-11. Visual check captured mobile and desktop screenshots with no browser errors.

features.name: Lighthouse optimization pass
features.description: Improve Lighthouse performance, accessibility, best-practices, and SEO with targeted static-app fixes.
features.evidence: Lighthouse improved from 50/93/96/92 to 91/100/96/100. Main bundle split from ~94.6 kB gzip to ~49.8 kB gzip plus lazy map chunk; robots.txt, metadata, and Vercel headers added.

features.name: End-to-end test coverage
features.description: Add Playwright Test coverage for core public user flows: initial load, language persistence, search/filter, and geolocation nearby results.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed npm test, npm run build, and npm run test:e2e. Playwright e2e covered 10 desktop/mobile tests for load, language persistence, search/filter, geolocation success, and geolocation denial.

features.name: Code review fixes
features.description: Review current app, PWA, and test harness changes for correctness, maintainability, and deployment risks; fix confirmed findings.
features.evidence: Fixed service-worker stale app-shell caching, removed language-change data refetch, removed dead init.sh cleanup code, and disabled nearby lookup until bins load. ./init.sh passed after fixes.

features.name: AI slop cleanup
features.description: Remove redundant generated utilities, dead CSS, and stale harness references while preserving app behavior.
features.evidence: Deleted redundant smoke/visual utility scripts, removed dead marker CSS, and cleaned stale harness references. ./init.sh passed after cleanup.

features.name: Publish readiness assets and docs
features.description: Add production PWA icons, data metadata/last-updated note, Vercel deployment documentation, and bilingual system-design/tradeoff docs.
features.evidence: Added PNG PWA icons, generated metadata, footer last-updated note, bilingual README/docs, and Vercel deployment docs. ./init.sh and harness validation passed.

features.name: Street cleanliness facility expansion
features.description: Extend the map from pedestrian garbage bins to generic public cleanliness facilities by adding Taipei dog-waste bag box data, facility type filters, type-specific warnings, and conversion reports.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 1707 combined facilities, including 510 dog-waste bag boxes and coordinate outlier reporting. ./init.sh passed npm test, npm run build, and 12 Playwright e2e tests on 2026-06-12.

features.name: Public amenities toilet expansion
features.description: Reposition the product as a public amenities map by adding Taipei public toilet data, toilet-specific filters/details, PWA metadata updates, and marker rendering safeguards.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 3256 combined facilities, including 1549 public toilets. ./init.sh passed npm test, npm run build, and 16 desktop/mobile Playwright e2e tests on 2026-06-12.

features.name: Public-place drinking fountain expansion
features.description: Add Taipei public-place drinking fountain data as a fourth static facility layer with API fetch, raw JSON storage, conversion, filters, search, nearby results, marker legend, warnings, and documentation.
features.evidence: npm run fetch:drinking-fountains fetched 144 raw records; npm run convert:facilities generated 3400 combined facilities, including 144 public drinking fountain locations and 1086 drinking fountain units. npm test, npm run build, and npm run test:e2e passed with 20 desktop/mobile Playwright tests on 2026-06-16.

features.name: Timed collection and direct drinking station expansion
features.description: Add Taipei timed waste collection points and direct drinking stations as static facility layers with Big5 conversion, filters, search, map/list/popups, notices, PWA cache, and documentation.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 4163 facilities, including 30 timed collection points and 733 direct drinking stations (695 Taipei, 38 outside Taipei). ./init.sh passed 22 unit/converter tests, production build, and 24 desktop/mobile Playwright tests on 2026-06-18.

features.name: Used-clothing recycling box expansion
features.description: Add approved Taipei used-clothing recycling boxes as a static facility layer with local CSV conversion, village/organization/phone filters, search, map/list/popups, notices, cache, and documentation.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 5347 facilities, including 1184 used-clothing recycling boxes and 29 coordinate outliers. ./init.sh passed 24 unit/converter tests, production build, and 26 desktop/mobile Playwright tests on 2026-06-22.

features.name: Lactation room family-friendly expansion
features.description: Add Taipei lactation rooms from two Big5/CP950 resources with deduplication, legal-list cross-reference, district summaries, directory filters, address-based map links, optional verified coordinates, cache support, and bilingual notices.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 5830 facilities, including 483 lactation rooms across all 12 districts. Verification completed with 29 unit/converter tests, production build, and 30 desktop/mobile Playwright tests.

features.name: Specialized toilet layer expansion
features.description: Add Taipei riverside toilets and family-friendly toilets as distinct static layers with CP950 conversion, coordinate validation, soft public-toilet matching, focused filters, nearby results, summaries, cache support, and bilingual notices.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 6557 facilities, including 334 riverside toilets and 393 family-friendly toilets. All new coordinates were valid, all current family-friendly records matched general public-toilet records, and 33 unit/converter plus 34 desktop/mobile Playwright tests passed.

features.name: Motorcycle inspection station expansion
features.description: Add Taipei motorcycle inspection stations as a public-service location layer with UTF-8-SIG conversion, district summaries, brand/postal/phone filters, address-based links, cache support, and privacy-minimized UI.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 6802 facilities, including 245 motorcycle inspection stations across all 12 districts. Responsible-person data is preserved in JSON but not shown on default cards/popups.

features.name: Electric motorcycle charging station expansion
features.description: Add Taipei electric motorcycle charging stations as an address-only public-service layer with UTF-8-SIG conversion, category filters, district summaries, address-based links, cache support, and no real-time availability claims.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 7200 facilities, including 398 electric motorcycle charging stations across all 12 districts. The source has no coordinates, so the UI uses district summaries and address-based Google Maps links.

features.name: Commercial EV charging and swap station expansion
features.description: Add Taipei commercial EV charging and battery-swap stations as an address-only service layer with CP950 conversion, service/operator/city filters, district summaries, address-based links, cache support, and no real-time availability claims.
features.evidence: npm run convert:bins generated 7817 facilities, including 617 commercial EV charging and battery-swap stations. The source has no coordinates, so the UI uses district summaries and address-based Google Maps links.
